frameworks.name: population-level neural decoding
frameworks.one_line: dimensionality reduction and decoding isolate stimulus, action, and motion subspaces

frameworks.name: sensorimotor linking via mPFC
frameworks.one_line: prefrontal cortex links sensory cues to learned behavioral outputs

frameworks.name: goal-directed action selection
frameworks.one_line: mPFC contributes to selection between alternative learned actions

core_question: How does mPFC population activity link sensory stimuli to learned avoidance behaviors?
key_assumptions: population activity can be decomposed into stimulus, action, and motion components
mPFC mediates the sensory-to-behavior link for learned behaviors
calcium imaging captures behaviorally relevant prefrontal population dynamics
manipulations: comparison of two different learned avoidance actions
dimensionality reduction to isolate stimulus vs action vs motion activity
key_findings: tone-related activity was not informative about upcoming behavior
avoidance-related activity was predictive of upcoming avoidance actions
avoidance-related activity distinguished between two different learned avoidance actions
interpretations: mPFC contributes to selection between different goal-directed actions
prefrontal population codes implement the sensory-behavior link for learned avoidance
